title: senecio subsessilis
intro: Senecio subsessilis is a plant species belonging to the daisy family, characterized by its unique appearance and medicinal properties. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Senecio subsessilis has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to leverage its medicinal properties.
